buildCommand: next build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const d=path.join('.next', 'server'); if(!fs.existsSync(d)) fs.mkdirSync(d, {recursive:true}); const p=path.join(d, 'middleware.js.nft.json'); if(!fs.existsSync(p)) fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify({version:1,files:[]}));"
